Aligning controls Status bar Keyboard operations context menu Displaying assigned symbols in CANoe/CANalyzer Displaying and entering hexadecimal or binary values Transparency Color Multiselection of controls Panel Conversion: Notes

Starting from version 7.0 you can easily design and configure panels (*.xvp) with the Panel Designer.Panels (*.cnp) which already exist will still be opened and edited in the Panel Editor. Signals, environment variables and system variables are called symbols.
